templates.name: Nature/Kamchatka Script (Long-form)
templates.description: 10+ minute deep dive into nature/volcanoes. Structured by chapters for consistency.

hook.content: Imagine a land where the earth breathes fire and the water boils beneath your feet. Welcome to Kamchatka.

chapters.title: The Valley of Geysers
chapters.content: Detailed exploration of the geothermal activity and unique ecosystem.

chapters.title: The Giants: Klyuchevskaya Sopka
chapters.content: Focus on the highest active volcano in Eurasia.

chapters.title: Wildlife: The Brown Bears
chapters.content: Observing the salmon run and bear behavior at Kurile Lake.

outro.content: Kamchatka is a reminder of our planet's raw power. Subscribe to explore more hidden corners of the world.

templates.name: Viral Kamchatka Short (9:16)
templates.description: 50-60 second high-retention vertical video about Kamchatka's extreme nature.

structure.hook: You are looking at the most dangerous beauty on Earth. This is Kamchatka.
structure.pacing: Fast cuts every 1.5-2 seconds. High-energy background music.
body: Fact 1: 300 volcanoes, 30 of them are active right now.
Fact 2: The Valley of Geysers is the second largest concentration in the world.
Fact 3: Giant brown bears are everywhere, and they aren't friendly.
structure.visual_style: Cinematic FPV drone shots mixed with close-up lava flows.
structure.cta: Subscribe to see the full expedition!

templates.name: AI Agents: Viral Sales Script (Short-form)
templates.description: Selling, informative, and viral short for B2B/Tech niche. Focus on ROI and automation.

structure.hook: Stop hiring humans for repetitive tasks. AI Agents are taking over in 2024.
structure.problem: You're wasting 20 hours a week on emails and data entry. It's killing your business.
structure.solution: Meet the 'Content Factory' agent. It researches, writes, and posts while you sleep.
structure.proof: We scaled a channel to 100k subs in 30 days using this exact workflow.
structure.cta: Comment 'AGENT' to get the n8n blueprint for free!

templates.character_prompt: A professional young male tech entrepreneur, wearing a modern hoodie, standing in a high-tech minimalist office, looking directly at the camera, realistic, 8k, cinematic lighting.

templates.name: AI Agents: The Future of Work (Long-form)
templates.description: Informative deep dive into AI Agent architecture and business applications.

structure.hook: The era of 'Chatbots' is over. The era of 'Autonomous Agents' has begun.

chapters.title: What is an AI Agent?
chapters.content: Explaining the difference between LLMs and Agents (Reasoning + Tools).

chapters.title: The Tech Stack: n8n, LangChain, and OpenAI
chapters.content: How to build your first autonomous workforce.

chapters.title: Real World Use Cases
chapters.content: Customer support, lead gen, and content creation at scale.

structure.outro: The question isn't IF AI will replace tasks, but WHEN you will start using it. Join our community to stay ahead.
